title: 7 PCs 40mm Colorful Crystal Glass Chakra Balls Set – Decorative Natural Spheres with LED Wooden Base Night Light Decor for Home Wedding, Party Positive Energy Gifts
features: Perfect Gift - This set of crystal balls is perfect for friends, family, lovers, or anyone who appreciates spiritual wellness, it' s more than just a decorative piece; it' s a symbol of positive energy and harmony. Yoga enthusiasts, gemstone collectors, and those who love cosmic-inspired decor will especially adore its radiant glow and serene presence

Unique Decoration - These 7 pcs elegant spheres effortlessly elevate your dining table, adding a touch of festive charm to dinner parties, while their radiant hues create a serene and vibrant atmosphere in your living space. Simply place them on the included LED wooden base, turn on the light, and instantly transform any room with a mesmerizing starry-night glow—ideal for meditation, Feng Shui, or celestial-themed decor. Whether used as a centerpiece, night light, or spiritual decor, they make a captivating finishing touch to your interior design
Precise Craftsmanship - Crafted from premium natural crystal, each of the 7 vibrant glass balls features a unique chakra color, radiating both beauty and positive energy

Colorful Balls & LED Wooden Base - These stunning crystal spheres effortlessly enhance any space—be it for meditation, Feng Shui, or simply as a mesmerizing night light. The set includes a rectangular LED wooden base (approximately 12.2 inches in diameter), which elegantly displays the 1.5 inches spheres—perfect for creating a soothing glow in any space

Thoughtful packaging - This set is packaged in a beautiful gift box, which contains a wooden LED base (approximately 12.2 inches), a cleaning cloth, 7 crystal balls (each about 1.5 inches), a USB cable and a blank gift card
